parameters.command:
=YTDLP="/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/yt-dlp"
  FFMPEG="/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/opt/ffmpeg-full/bin/ffmpeg"
  FFPROBE="/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/opt/ffmpeg-full/bin/ffprobe"
  OUTDIR="/mnt/qnap_multimedia/movies/movies"
  URL="{{ $json.query.url }}"

  # Timestamp marker before download
  touch /tmp/yt_marker

  # Download video + metadata + thumbnail
  $YTDLP \
    --write-info-json \
    --write-thumbnail \
    --convert-thumbnails jpg \
    --embed-thumbnail \
    --add-metadata \
    -o "$OUTDIR/%(uploader)s - %(title)s.%(ext)s" \
    "$URL"

  # Find the video file newer than our marker
  FILEPATH=$(find "$OUTDIR" -maxdepth 1 -newer /tmp/yt_marker \( -iname "*.mp4" -o -iname "*.mkv" -o -iname "*.webm" -o -iname "*.mov" \) | head -1)

  if [ -z "$FILEPATH" ]; then
    echo "Could not find downloaded file"
    exit 1
  fi

  echo "Downloaded: $FILEPATH"
  BASENAME="${FILEPATH%.*}"

  # Get duration in seconds
  DURATION=$($FFPROBE -v error -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$FILEPATH" | cut -d. -f1)

  # Extract 5 frames between 10% and 75%
  MAX=$(( DURATION * 75 / 100 ))
  MIN=$(( DURATION * 10 / 100 ))
  STEP=$(( (MAX - MIN) / 4 ))

  for i in 0 1 2 3 4; do
    TS=$(( MIN + i * STEP ))
    $FFMPEG -ss $TS -i "$FILEPATH" -vframes 1 -q:v 2 "${BASENAME}-thumb$((i+1)).jpg" -y 2>/dev/null
    echo "Saved thumb$((i+1)) at ${TS}s"
  done
